reviews.review: Overdrift is still one of the most fun Drifting games to date!!

Another cashgrab game. Honestly I want to "Not Recommend" because of the grind level of this, but hey! I had made up a solution for that. So it wasn't that bad.

Plus this definitely isnt a game where you play for 10 hours and get pro, every car's cash system is unique, which can be bypassed by making points on a 100% car and cashing on the lower ones. Atleast that option is there. 

MAKE FRIENDS. Its an Online-Only game... so what are waiting for? There's no fun in drifting alone. Tandeming is peak tbh, I spent over 6 months just trying to get a tune right (and no I didnt pick anyone else's tunes I make my own). This game REQUIRES you to hook on it. 
Neverthless I have awesome buddies in the game that keep pulling me here and prevent me from hitting uninstall. So there goes another 500 hours ig.......
ADD ACHIEVEMENTS

When the game was small and unpopular, it was great. Now that it's famous, developers saw the opportunity to put as much microtransactions in the game as possible. 50% of the game is locked behing microtransactions actually. Initally you were able to obtain every car simply just by grinding. Now you can buy like 8 free cars and the rest you have to buy with DLCs and THEN grind for them and buy them with the in-game currency. If the developers don't A) lower the prices of the DLCs, because they are ridiculously expensive (you can get a whole game for the price of some of them) or B) remove them entirely and let players enjoy playing a game they paid not so small money for, players are definitelly going to quit playing it, like I am now. Maybe if they didn't give away tens of steam codes for free, they wouldn't need to scrub as much money off of the players as possible.

THIS GAME IS AMAZING!!!!! but the cons aboout this game (for me) 1. every time i want to play i have to restart my pc or it will freeze when i get in the game. 2. most of the time when i close it i will go like 2 or 3 levels behind when i reopen it. 3.( this is a recommendation) when your drifting you get points and then you can get them quicker by getting big angle, full send, backwards, and many more. Damn
very cool cars

Ill start with the negatives. There isn't much to do besides drift around, you cant really turn much without drifting, and you have less customization of your cars compared to carx, you arent changing the parts on the car, just the color of stuff and the sounds, and it has a very low player base, you will be playing with the same 10-20 people. But for an arcade drifting game, its the most smooth feeling one I have played, there is a good amount of cars to choose from, and you can tune them how you want "not engine tunes, just transmission and wheels". In my experience, the drifting in this game feels a lot better than carx, but less realistic, but if i want to drift realisitically, i boot up assetto corsa.
This game and Carx Drift Racing, the best 2 drift car games EVER
Good drifting game for relaxing after a long day
the game is good but you cant get much angle apart from that no complaints

I Have 364 hours in the game, and I got it very close to release. The game was WAY better then. Now it's a micro transaction simulator. This became a perfect example of was made by somebody that had good faith, but got the taste of money and wanted more. I really was hopeful for this game on release. Now I hope it dies, and hopefully something else will replace it.

Most cars and modifications to those cars are behind a paywall. Even then liveries are capped at 99 layers, and you have no actual customization to the body, like want a body kit? That's a whole different car in game that you have to pay for with actual money. 

You have to map all controls manually, and even then it breaks and you can no longer use a controller or wheel randomly. I was going to use the controller I always used on this game and it simply won't map correctly anymore. (This was my final straw coming back to the game at the time of writing this.) 

The handling of the cars is honestly not horrible, but it's not far off. This game is more arcade then sim, and the cars are a nightmare to drive with anything less then 50% of the max upgrades that you have to unlock by drifting and earning money on EACH car you unlock. Or pay for DLCs and get them all at 50% and still have to get them to 100%. There is a lot of grinding to get even one 100% car I have over 20 each costing around 100-200k credits in-game, and I have 2million credits in a car that I can't use on any other cars as that cash is locked to that car....

The community is EXTREMELY toxic. Even making a few people I know have IRL problems.
Many "clans" gate keeps others from playing by ramming, and bulling them online. Keep in mind this is a fully online game. You can create servers with a player cap or password to play by your self or friends you already know, but then you can't actually play the game as it is made to.

🟢 Mystery Exploration = No gameplay introduction

🟢 Redo same drifting until time is up
🟢 Long hours gameplay = Content unlock slowly
🔴 Versus personal best record as a challenge
🔴 Versus same ranked / ghost opponent 
🔴 Playable when server is down / offline
🔴 Diverse game mode

🏅 Community Rating: [b] Very Positive [/b]
⚖️ [b]fMeter {B-}[/b] Worth a play, if you enjoy Free Roaming Aimlessly doing repetitive tasks. However, if you're looking for training to break record, those are unavailable.
🔎 Long Version Checklist ➜ [u][url=https://steamcommunity.com/groups/expectationchecklist/discussions/1/4763207146661766064/]Reveal[/url][/u]

[h1] 🕘          IMPRESSION:[/h1]
* Year 2022: Game released 
* 15 min later: Started playtest on Demo, sadly it is not what I expected
* Year 2024: A well-edited video review pulled me back in
* 2 hours earlier: Cannot find an informative review but "very positive" rating on Steam?
* 2 hours later: Uncover the facts behind the beautiful rating

[h1]  🔊         TESTER MUST KNOW:[/h1]
* We can create a server with custom setting
* Click and wait 5 sec to teleport in the map
* Damage Penalty = Losing drift ability 
* Free roam to earn style points & convert into cash
* Enter cash zone to earn style points money
* Earned money is tied to each car, cannot spend on another car
* Disqualify event when player gone too far away from the circuit
* Lack of community livery to download, limited to 1 livery for only specific car
* Downloaded free demo will not able to join server anymore

[h1] 💎 SAME GENRE COMPARISON:[/h1]
* No race menu, must fast travel to each location to start a game
* No track wall, no AI bot, no ghost car
* Complete multiple circuit mode to unlock more cars
* Completed circuit track will not mark as completed
* Car collision with online players when drifting
* Deep customization option on tuning
* Many visual customization moved to DLC
* All the beautiful cars moved to DLC
* List of repetitive challenges for Daily Task & Weekly Task
* No ping display in the server list

[h1]  ⚠️        RUMOR CHECKING:[/h1]
* It is a fun game to play ➜ Happen only if you love free roam with public players
* Huge desync between players & poor optimized ➜ Disagree
* UI is terrible ➜ Because there are too many buttons on the screen at once
* Car become undriftable when drifting is the only way to earn money ➜ True, when the money is tied to each car, and damaged car require money to repair. This idea makes the car unplayable.

[h1][b][u] this game is a banger[/u].

[h3] the graphics are for sure up there. the game is very chill to play, as well as very pleasing to take in and look at. there is quite a bit of customization, but there definitely could be more. there isn't a whole lot of content, but the updates are always packed with features and fixes. this game does take quite a bit of practice, but it's for sure worth it in the long run. the community is great, and never toxic. people are always very helpful as well.

[b] this game is an [u]8.5/10[/u], i would for sure recommend. [/b]

A really cool drifting game just for the fun of it.
The community seems to be very friendly. You either encounter people who don't communicate at all or do it in a friendly way. I have yet to encounter anyone who is rude or toxic.

The driving physics feel great. Or should I say drifting physics, since this is what the game is all about?

The customization is nice! You don't have to stick to premade liveries, you can create your very own one ingame.
Lots of decals, wheels, tires, exhausts, etc. to choose from. Sadly no wings though. I'd love to put the iconic Evo2 wing on my 190E.

Money is earned by drifting, either in events or just in freeride.

Why so many negative reviews? 
While the people do have a point about the dlc stuff and having some customization like neon and tire smoke behind a paywall, they are exaggerating badly by saying "almost all cars are behind paywall". That's not true. You can unlock many cars with just the base game. I bought the "overpass" and the car pack that included my dream car. That's all I'll ever need in the game.

The graphics are quite okay, definitely better than comparable drift games though.

The sound design isn't too great. The car sounds are low quality and the music... ugh... It's a matter of your own personal music taste, but I'm grateful for the ability to turn the music volume to 0%. All in game music is some kind of techno dubsteb gangsterrap combined.

It plays very well with a steering wheel and uses 900°, so no worries, no only 180° ratio like in other games.

What definitely needs to be added in my opinion is an option to make the camera automatically look in the direction your drifting in cokpit view. I play only in cockpit view and tandem drifting is basically a gamble because I can't see the other car or even the track. 
Or maybe even a VR option. That would be ideal for me.

All in all probably one of the best dedicated drifting games around!

the game started off as a second home with plenty of help for beginners and a great way to meet new people, but seemingly over a month or so, the community has begun to eat themselves alive over an apparent club war. people disrespecting people for their affiliation to a team, or the color of their car. 

This is no longer a safe place to come to for even thick skin members because at the core of the issue, this was meant to be a drifting game for people to enjoy TOGETHER. and even as fun as the driving in the game is, it's over shadowed by the sheer toxic behavior slowly growing in this very small community. 

you will see everybody you drift with again, the servers are not larger or random, and this can be good or bad. it used to be fun seeing everybody day after day and getting close with people.

my only regret now is i cant get a refund after 700 hours.

Update: your community has bred nothing but hatred, and arrogance. somebody tell me when it shares the Fate of furidashi
